0.0195*(0.8041 - x_1)**2 - 0.7947*exp(0.0188*exp(1.4882*x_1) - 0.0446*sin(4.258*x_2 - 0.6877)) - 0.162*exp(-0.0878*sin(1.3703*x_1 - 7.9654) - 0.0339*sin(2.0223*x_2 + 2.9853)) - 0.0593*sin(1.3725*x_2 + 1.2082) + 0.6296

-0.0055*(0.3027*exp(1.4882*x_1) - 0.7165*sin(4.258*x_2 - 0.6877) - 1)**2 - 0.0096*(0.4773*sin(1.3703*x_1 - 7.9654) + 0.1845*sin(2.0223*x_2 + 2.9853) - 1)**2 - 0.7607*sin(0.1213*(0.8041 - x_1)**2 - 0.3689*sin(1.3725*x_2 + 1.2082) + 2.7776) + 1.7499
